name: datapusher-plus: alert on Crashed state
description: Fires immediately when any DataPusher+ flow run enters the Crashed state (worker killed, OOM, infrastructure error). Wire the action to your Slack/Pagerduty webhook in the Prefect UI before applying.

actions.subject: DataPusher+ flow Crashed
actions.body: Flow run {{ event.resource.id }} crashed. Investigate the worker logs and re-run from the Prefect UI when ready.
